failures.description: The agent misread the catalog search result and answered that item 1507389580 at $1157.86 was cheapest, even though item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned two available Smartphones sorted by ascending price, with item 5339029584 priced at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 priced at $1157.86. The Executor used that output to synthesize the answer but selected the higher-priced item as the cheapest. This contradicts the tool output and is a clear reasoning/comparison error, not an invalid tool call or missing information.
